# Live Somewhere

> Where people and progress live together.

Live Somewhere is a community-driven learning platform focused on practical growth, shared knowledge, and meaningful progress.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured tutorials and latest posts.
- [Blog](/blog): All tutorials and guides.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse tutorials by topic (Linux, hacking, networking, DevOps).
- [Courses](/courses): Interactive courses with terminal practice and certificates.
- [About](/about): About Live Somewhere and the team.
